tool_args.label: Proposed 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Proposed 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Proposed 2023 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan listing recurring and specific agenda items by month for the Metro-North Railroad Committee.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.claim_text: A summary is provided by agency of any procurement or action item included in the monthly agenda.
payload.subject: Summary of Actions
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Summary of Actions (if any)

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.subject: Approval of Minutes
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Approval of Minutes

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.subject: Work Plan
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Work Plan

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Safety

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: Police Activity Report
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Police Activity Report

payload.claim_text: Materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to certain agency initiatives and functions.
payload.subject: Information Items
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Information Items (if any)

payload.claim_text: Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.
payload.subject: Action Items
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Action Items (if any)

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Procurements

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Operations

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.
payload.subject: Finance
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Finance

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that includes a comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership
payload.description: Recurring agenda item: Ridership

tool_args.label: January 2023: Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2023 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

The Agency will present its revised 2023 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2023 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2023 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2023 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2022 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: May 2023: Final Review of 2022 Operating Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: June 2023: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan

payload.description: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
payload.event_name: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan

tool_args.label: July 2023: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development

payload.description: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2023 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

tool_args.label: November 2023: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan

payload.description: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
payload.event_name: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan

payload.description: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2024.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.
Quarterly reports highlighting the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
Positive Train Control implementation and close-out for both LIRR and MNR railroads following full functionality going into effect in December 2020.
Leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
